title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCCs Go from Strength to Strength as Sanctions Drive Strong Sentiment - VLCC rates continued their surge into late October , led by the Arabian Gulf-China and West Africa-China routes.
